_comment: Crop boxes for the #region ingest, fractions [left,top,right,bottom] of the 1376x768 sheet. Authored 2026-06-03 (eval-foundation reset, A4 region ingest): the five body views replace the drifted ~1:4-1:5.3 plates; proportion human-verified at 1:7 by Sean (SF03 gate pending, re-verify retroactively once built). Facing convention: left profile = faces left.
